commands.name: add-dir
commands.description: Add a working directory for file access this session

commands.name: advisor
commands.description: Enable/disable the advisor tool that consults a second model

commands.name: agents
commands.description: Manage subagent configurations

commands.name: background
commands.description: Detach the session to run as a background agent

commands.name: batch
commands.description: Orchestrate large-scale changes across a codebase in parallel

commands.name: branch
commands.description: Branch the conversation here to try a different direction

commands.name: btw
commands.description: Ask a quick side question without adding to the conversation

commands.name: cd
commands.description: Move this session to a new working directory

commands.name: claude-api
commands.description: Load Claude API reference material for your language

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Start a new conversation with empty context

commands.name: code-review
commands.description: Review the diff for bugs and cleanups; --fix applies them

commands.name: compact
commands.description: Summarize the conversation to free up context

commands.name: config
commands.description: Open settings, or set key=value directly

commands.name: context
commands.description: Visualize current context-window usage

commands.name: copy
commands.description: Copy the last assistant response to the clipboard

commands.name: cost
commands.description: Show session cost and usage (alias of /usage)

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Enable debug logging and troubleshoot session issues

commands.name: deep-research
commands.description: Fan out web searches and synthesize a cited report

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Open an interactive diff viewer of uncommitted changes

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Diagnose and verify your Claude Code installation

commands.name: effort
commands.description: Set the model effort level (low/medium/high/xhigh/max)

commands.name: exit
commands.description: Exit the CLI

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export the current conversation as plain text

commands.name: fast
commands.description: Toggle fast mode on or off

commands.name: feedback
commands.description: Submit feedback, report a bug, or share the conversation

commands.name: fewer-permission-prompts
commands.description: Allowlist common read-only calls to reduce permission prompts

commands.name: focus
commands.description: Toggle the focus view (fullscreen only)

commands.name: fork
commands.description: Spawn a forked subagent that works while you keep going

commands.name: goal
commands.description: Set a goal Claude keeps working toward across turns

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show help and available commands

commands.name: hooks
commands.description: View hook configurations for tool events

commands.name: ide
commands.description: Manage IDE integrations and show status

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize the project with a CLAUDE.md guide

commands.name: insights
commands.description: Generate a report analyzing your Claude Code sessions

commands.name: login
commands.description: Sign in to your Anthropic account

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Sign out from your Anthropic account

commands.name: loop
commands.description: Run a prompt repeatedly while the session stays open

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Manage MCP server connections and authentication

commands.name: memory
commands.description: Edit CLAUDE.md memory files and auto-memory

commands.name: model
commands.description: Switch the AI model and save it as your default

commands.name: permissions
commands.description: Manage allow/ask/deny tool-permission rules

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Enter plan mode from the prompt

commands.name: plugin
commands.description: Manage Claude Code plugins

commands.name: recap
commands.description: Generate a one-line summary of the current session

commands.name: release-notes
commands.description: View the changelog in an interactive version picker

commands.name: reload-plugins
commands.description: Reload active plugins to apply pending changes

commands.name: reload-skills
commands.description: Re-scan skill and command directories

commands.name: remote-control
commands.description: Make this session available for remote control from claude.ai

commands.name: rename
commands.description: Rename the current session

commands.name: resume
commands.description: Resume a conversation by ID or name

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review a pull request locally

commands.name: rewind
commands.description: Rewind conversation and/or code to a checkpoint

commands.name: run
commands.description: Launch and drive your app to see a change working

commands.name: run-skill-generator
commands.description: Write a per-project skill to build and run your app

commands.name: sandbox
commands.description: Toggle sandbox mode

commands.name: schedule
commands.description: Create, update, or run scheduled cloud routines

commands.name: security-review
commands.description: Analyze pending changes for security vulnerabilities

commands.name: simplify
commands.description: Review changed code for cleanups and apply the fixes

commands.name: skills
commands.description: List available skills

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Show usage stats (alias of /usage)

commands.name: status
commands.description: Open the Settings interface (Status tab)

commands.name: statusline
commands.description: Configure Claude Code's status line

commands.name: tasks
commands.description: View and manage everything running in the background

commands.name: team-onboarding
commands.description: Generate a team onboarding guide from your usage

commands.name: teleport
commands.description: Pull a Claude Code on the web session into this terminal

commands.name: theme
commands.description: Change the color theme

commands.name: tui
commands.description: Set the terminal UI renderer

commands.name: ultraplan
commands.description: Draft a plan in an ultraplan session and review it

commands.name: ultrareview
commands.description: Run a deep multi-agent code review in the cloud

commands.name: upgrade
commands.description: Open the upgrade page to switch plan tier

commands.name: usage
commands.description: Show session cost, plan limits, and activity stats

commands.name: usage-credits
commands.description: Configure usage credits to keep working past a limit

commands.description: Build and run your app to confirm a change works

commands.name: voice
commands.description: Toggle voice dictation

commands.name: workflows
commands.description: Open the workflow progress view to watch running workflows
